field_occurrences.description: Dimension to use on x-axis. 在 big_number 中此控件显示名被重写为 Temporal X-Axis，并限制只能选时间列。

original_field.enum_source: datasource temporal columns; xAxisMixin 会在 legacy 的 granularity_sqla 已存在且 x_axis 为空时做初始回填
original_field.notes: getXAxisColumn(formData) 优先读取 x_axis；如果 x_axis 为空但 granularity_sqla 存在，则回退为 DTTM_ALIAS。这是兼容逻辑，不是新模板的主路径。

field_occurrences.description: Select a time grain for the visualization. The grain is the time interval represented by a single point on the chart.

field_occurrences.description: Method to compute the displayed value. "Overall value" calculates a single metric across the entire filtered time period, ideal for non-additive metrics like ratios, averages, or distinct counts. Other methods operate over the time series data points.

original_field.description: Method to compute the displayed value. "Overall value" calculates a single metric across the entire filtered time period, ideal for non-additive metrics like ratios, averages, or distinct counts. Other methods operate over the time series data points.
original_field.notes: aggregation='raw' 时 buildQuery.ts 会追加第 2 个 query，并用服务端返回的聚合结果做 big number；其它值只发 1 个 query，并在前端按 aggregationChoices 做客户端聚合。

field_occurrences.description: The minimum number of rolling periods required to show a value. For instance if you do a cumulative sum on 7 days you may want your "Min Period" to be 7, so that all data points shown are the total of 7 periods. This will hide the "ramp up" taking place over the first 7 periods

original_field.description: The minimum number of rolling periods required to show a value. For instance if you do a cumulative sum on 7 days you may want your "Min Period" to be 7, so that all data points shown are the total of 7 periods. This will hide the "ramp up" taking place over the first 7 periods
original_field.notes: rollingWindowOperator.ts 会把它转换成 rolling 的 min_periods；缺省时回退为 0。

original_field.notes: getXAxisColumn(formData) 优先读取 x_axis；如果 x_axis 为空但 granularity_sqla 存在，则回退为 DTTM_ALIAS。这是兼容逻辑，不是新模板的主路径。

original_field.notes: controlOverrides 把显示标签从 Y Axis Format 改成了 Number format。

notes: big_number 不是 big_number_total 的简单变体。它的 Query 区包含 temporal x_axis、time_grain_sqla、aggregation、metric 和 adhoc_filters，并且会生成趋势线查询。
字段名优先取 controlPanel 配置中的 name；如 transformProps/types 中确认了 camelCase 运行时别名，则补充 runtime_alias。
x_axis 在 controlOverrides 中被重命名为 Temporal X-Axis，并用 temporalColumnMixin 把可选项限制为数据源的时间列；但 API form_data 键名仍然是 x_axis。
buildQuery.ts 明确只有 aggregation='raw' 时才会追加第 2 个 query；其它聚合方式都只发 1 个 query，并在 transformProps.ts 中用 aggregationChoices 做客户端聚合。
compare_lag 和 compare_suffix 产出的不是单独的持久化 subheader 字段，而是 transformProps.ts 运行时计算出的比较摘要。当前 controlPanel 没有 subheader 文本输入框。
time_range_fixed 只是趋势线渲染选项。controlPanel 里它仅在 form_data.time_range 存在且不为 No filter 时显示；transformProps.ts 里它只会在趋势线数据存在且 from_dttm/to_dttm 可得时补齐首尾空点。
y_axis_format 在 controlPanel 中被重命名为 Number format；color_picker 的共享默认值来自 PRIMARY_COLOR={r:0,g:122,b:135,a:1}，而趋势图运行时仅读取 r/g/b。

Query.description: Dimension to use on x-axis. 在 big_number 中此控件显示名被重写为 Temporal X-Axis，并限制只能选时间列。
Query.enum_source: datasource temporal columns; xAxisMixin 会在 legacy 的 granularity_sqla 已存在且 x_axis 为空时做初始回填
Query.notes: getXAxisColumn(formData) 优先读取 x_axis；如果 x_axis 为空但 granularity_sqla 存在，则回退为 DTTM_ALIAS。这是兼容逻辑，不是新模板的主路径。

Query.description: Select a time grain for the visualization. The grain is the time interval represented by a single point on the chart.

Method to compute the displayed value. "Overall value" calculates a single metric across the entire filtered time period, ideal for non-additive metrics like ratios, averages, or distinct counts. Other methods operate over the time series data points.
Query.notes: aggregation='raw' 时 buildQuery.ts 会追加第 2 个 query，并用服务端返回的聚合结果做 big number；其它值只发 1 个 query，并在前端按 aggregationChoices 做客户端聚合。

Query.description: Select a metric to display. You can use an aggregation function on a column or write custom SQL to create a metric.
字段标签为 Filters。当前图表没有独立 time_range 控件，时间过滤通常通过此字段中的 TEMPORAL_RANGE 过滤条件表达。
Query.enum_source: dataset columns + saved metrics + 当前 metric

Options.description: Based on granularity, number of time periods to compare against
Options.notes: transformProps.ts 会执行 Number(compareLag) || 0。只有 compare_lag > 0 且趋势线数据点足够时，才会生成百分比比较摘要。

Options.description: Suffix to apply after the percentage display
Options.notes: 与 compare_lag 联动，仅影响运行时生成的 subheader 文本。

Options.description: Whether to display the trend line
Start y-axis at zero. Uncheck to start y-axis at minimum value in the data.
Options.notes: transformProps.ts 会把它翻译成 ECharts yAxis.scale = !startYAxisAtZero。

Options.description: Fix the trend line to the full time range specified in case filtered results do not include the start or end dates
Options.notes: 源码未声明显式 default。UI 仅在 form_data.time_range 存在且不为 No filter 时显示；运行时仅在 trendLineData 存在并且查询结果返回 from_dttm/to_dttm 时生效。

Chart Options / Color.description: Use this to define a static color for all circles
Chart Options / Color.notes: 共享控件默认值来自 PRIMARY_COLOR。transformProps.ts 仅读取 r/g/b 生成 rgb(...) 主色。

Chart Options / Typography.notes: 当前控制的是比较摘要/legacy subheader 行的字号。controlPanel 有该字体控件，但没有对应的 subheader 文本输入控件。

Chart Options / Typography.description: Whether to display the metric name

Chart Options / Typography.notes: 仅在 show_metric_name=true 时显示，且 resetOnHide=false。

Chart Options / Display Text.description: Description text that shows up below your Big Number

Chart Options / Number & Date Formatting.notes: controlOverrides 把显示标签从 Y Axis Format 改成了 Number format。

Chart Options / Number & Date Formatting.description: Use date formatting even when metric value is not a timestamp

Advanced Analytics.description: Defines a rolling window function to apply, works along with the [Periods] text box
Advanced Analytics.notes: rollingWindowOperator.ts 只有 mean/sum/std/cumsum 会生成 post_processing；'None' 不生成任何 rolling/cum 操作。

Advanced Analytics.description: Defines the size of the rolling window function, relative to the time granularity selected
Advanced Analytics.notes: 仅在 rolling_type 为 mean/sum/std 时作为 rolling window 的 window 参数。

Advanced Analytics.description: The minimum number of rolling periods required to show a value. For instance if you do a cumulative sum on 7 days you may want your "Min Period" to be 7, so that all data points shown are the total of 7 periods. This will hide the "ramp up" taking place over the first 7 periods
Advanced Analytics.notes: rollingWindowOperator.ts 会把它转换成 rolling 的 min_periods；缺省时回退为 0。
resampleOperator.ts 只有 resample_rule 与 resample_method 同时存在时才生成 resample post_processing；zerofill 会被翻译成 method='asfreq' 且 fill_value=0。
